## Verdict: **APPROVED WITH CONDITIONS**

Sprint 3 meets all Definition of Done criteria. Three open conditions carry forward (none represent defects in delivered functionality):

### Condition 1 — Story 3-5 deferred evidence (target: MVP-Integration-1 sprint)

Three evidence documents required before MVP-Integration-1 closes:
- `production/qa/evidence/csm-perf-soak-evidence.md` (AC-17)
- `production/qa/evidence/csm-replication-correctness-evidence.md` (AC-18)

### Condition 2 — Selene 2 carry-forward warnings (target: story 3-15 close-out)

`Network` and `RemoteEventName` unused-import warnings in `src/ServerStorage/Source/MatchStateServer/init.luau` lines 69-70. Reserved for story 3-15 AFKToggle 4-Check wiring. Must not accumulate further unused-import warnings on main before then.

### Condition 3 — TestEZ headless CI warn-only on Linux (carry-forward from Sprint 2)

Self-hosted macOS runner pending. Not blocking; pre-commit + manual run remain process gate.
